summary: Complete socialos-tools plugin skeleton by registering all tools in manifest/schema, making publish_execute optional, and enforcing publisher-only visibility via runtime policy checks and docs/tests updates.
commandsToRun: cd /Users/zhouyixiaoxiao/openclaw-foundry-socialos && git add socialos/openclaw/plugins/socialos-tools/tool-manifest.json socialos/openclaw/plugins/socialos-tools/tools.schema.json socialos/openclaw/runtime.openclaw.json5 scripts/tests/runtime_policy_check.mjs scripts/test.sh socialos/openclaw/plugins/socialos-tools/README.md
cd /Users/zhouyixiaoxiao/openclaw-foundry-socialos && git commit -m "[autodev] P0-2: finalize socialos-tools skeleton and publisher-only policy"
digestBullets: Registered full socialos-tools tool set in manifest and schema with consistent definitions.
Set publish_execute as optional while preserving publish flow contract.
Enforced publisher-only visibility in runtime config/policy paths.
Extended runtime policy test coverage for optional publish_execute and visibility constraints.
Updated test runner/docs to reflect plugin skeleton behavior and expected policy outcomes.
